name: Helm Of 300 Flames
description: This helmet was found inside the charred remains of a fire elemental general. As it is the only thing left of the last person to wear it, we can assume that it's magically enchanted to resist fire.
stats: Magic Def +1, Pierce Def +1, Melee Def +1, WIS +2, END +2, CHA +1, INT +3, DEX +3, STR +3, Bonus +4
notes:
• Helm was previously available from  Wrath of Xan (Wave).
• The following changes were implemented on  March 20th, 2026:
• Level's requirement was raised from 9 to 16.
• WIS, END, INT, DEX, STR, and Bonus stats were added.
• Fire Resist was raised from +4 to +5.

name: Helm of Aegis
description: Formed from a small blue crystal shard, leftover from your battle against Jaania, imbued with the aligned determination of weaver and ally. Proof of victory over Jaania (Extreme). Unlocks the Full Synch customization for DragonLord.
stats: None
notes:
• Own this item to unlock the Full Synch  Armor Customization options for the  DragonLord class.
• Own this item to obtain the  Asynchronized badge.
• Helm overlays the player's chosen hairstyle.

shared.description: This items requires a Dragon Amulet. This helm was taken from The Irismancer's temple. It allows the wearer to see details that they would not normally see.
shared.notes:
• II-IV versions were added on  October 20th, 2009.
• The following changes were implemented on  February 27th, 2026:
• Previously had the description: This item requires a Dragon Amulet. This helm was taken from The Irismancer's temple. It allows the wearer to see details that they would not normally see.
• Helms were tiered with Roman numerals.
• Helms' stats were updated.
• The following changes were implemented on  February 27th, 2026:
• Level's requirement was increased from 5 to 15.
• Avoidance stats (Melee/Pierce/Magic) were increased from +1 to +3.
• STR +3 and DEX +3 stats were added.
• Bonus was increased from +1 to +5.
• Immobility Resist +3 was added.
• The following changes were implemented on  February 27th, 2026:
• Avoidance stats (Melee/Pierce/Magic) were increased from +2 to +3.
• STR +5 and DEX +5 stats were added.
• Bonus was increased from +1 to +6.
• Immobility Resist +4 was added.
• The following changes were implemented on  February 27th, 2026:
• Avoidance stats (Melee/Pierce/Magic) were increased from +3 to +4.
• STR +6 and DEX +6 stats were added.
• Bonus was increased from +1 to +7.
• Immobility Resist was increased from +1 to +5.
• The following changes were implemented on  February 27th, 2026:
• Crit was lowered from +4 to 2.
• Avoidance stats (Melee/Pierce/Magic) were increased from +3 to +5.
• END +4 was removed.
• INT was increased from +7 to +8
• STR +8 and DEX +8 stats were added.
• Bonus was increased from +4 to +6.
• Immobility Resist was increased from +3 to +7.
